titleStmt.title: SII 20.234: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 234. (B.K. No. 82 of 1938-39.) KUNDGŌḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone built into the front wall of the Hanumantadēva temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1366, Raktākshi, Kārtika, s11u. 5. The weekday is not given. The tithi corresponded with A.D. 1444, October 16, which was Friday.

The inscription states that Vallabharāja and Yiḷamadhirāja installed the image of Hanumanta at Kundhāgal (Kundagōḷ). Vallabharāja is stated to be the son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Singarāja, a subordinate of the king. The sculptor was Kallōja, son of Bommavōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī jayādruya śakavaruṣa sāvirada muRead jayābhyudaya.
ṁnūṟu Aṟuvattāṟaneya raktākṣi saṁ
vatsarada kārttika śu 5 svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpruthvīva
llabha rājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāya ma
hārāyarugaḷa bhajā pratāpa yinakulatilaka gaṁḍara gaRead bhuja
ṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara siṁgarāja
tanubhavaru vollabharāja ru yiḷamadhirājaRead vallabharāja
ru kuṁdhāgalladalu śrī hanumāṁntina pratiṣṭheyanu māḍisiThis is a mistake for hanumantana
kaṁḍeṟasi māḍahēḷidaru Avara Āgneyali Aṁjanāsūnuvanu
kaṁḍiṟisidavaru brāmaṇanya kali Udbhavaru bomarājara
garbbharatnākararu charāmaṁṇanu ciṁnarājaru māḍi
sidaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī yē paḍavritti
kkavōjāyara kaṁmāṟa boṁmavōjana ma
ga kallōjanu māḍida hanumaṁtanu maṁ
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
